2026-05-01T20:05:19.2333740Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2334389Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2335338Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2335773Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2336123Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2336385Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2336569Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2336769Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2336967Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2337223Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2337449Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2337781Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2338074Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2338306Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:05:19.2338585Z [36;1mecho "Safe Outputs MCP server will run on port ${PORT}"[0m
